evals.prompt: Create an interactive screen flow diagram for a mobile food delivery app: Home Feed (list of restaurants) → Restaurant Detail (menu items) → Cart (order summary) → Checkout Form (address + payment) → Order Confirmation. Show the wireframe mockups for each screen with appropriate content (cards for the feed, hero image for detail, form fields for checkout). Include back navigation on each screen.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file with D3.js rendering 5 mobile screen mockups as wireframes connected by green action pills. Each screen should show type-appropriate wireframe content. Back navigation arrows should be present. Screens should have rounded corners, drop shadows, and green connector lines.

evals.prompt: Build a screen flow for a login/signup experience: Landing Page → Login Form → Dashboard (on success) OR Landing Page → Sign Up Form → Email Verification → Dashboard. Show both paths branching from the landing page. Include an error path from Login Form to 'Invalid Credentials' error screen that loops back.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file showing branching screen flows with two paths from the landing page. Login and signup forms should show form-type wireframe content. The error screen should be visually distinct (red accent). Dashboard should show dashboard-type content. Green connectors with action labels.

evals.prompt: Create a screen flow for a desktop web application's settings flow: Settings Overview (list of categories) → Profile Settings (form) → Notification Preferences (toggles) → Security Settings (form with password fields). Also show a modal dialog for 'Delete Account' that appears from Security Settings. Use desktop screen proportions.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file using desktop-proportioned screen mockups (wider than tall) with settings-type wireframe content (toggle rows, form fields). The delete account modal should appear as a smaller overlaid screen. All connected by green action pills with appropriate labels.
